requirement_topic.en: Market Access — In-Country Importer and GEOSTM Conformity / Market Surveillance
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——境内进口商及GEOSTM合格评定／市场监管
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——境內進口商及GEOSTM合格評定／市場監管

summary.en: Placing household refrigerating appliances on the Georgian market requires an established in-country economic operator — typically an in-country importer or distributor responsible for the product on the Georgian market. Under the EU-Georgia DCFTA, Georgia is approximating the EU New Approach conformity and market-surveillance model administered through GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology), with national conformity assessment and post-market surveillance. The in-country importer is generally responsible for ensuring the product carries the required conformity documentation (technical file, conformity declaration, and any conformity marking), that Georgian-language instructions and safety information are provided, and for cooperating with market surveillance authorities. Goods commonly enter via the Black Sea ports of Poti and Batumi. The exact conformity route, any marking obligation, and labelling/language requirements should be confirmed against current Georgian technical regulations and GEOSTM guidance, as the framework is in active EU-approximation transition.
summary.zh: 在格鲁吉亚市场投放家用制冷器具须有一个设立于境内的经济运营商——通常为对该产品在格鲁吉亚市场负责的境内进口商或经销商。在欧盟—格鲁吉亚DCFTA框架下，格鲁吉亚正向欧盟新方法合格评定及市场监管模式趋同，由GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局）管理，并实施国家合格评定与上市后监管。境内进口商一般负责确保产品附有所需的合格文件（技术文件、合格声明及任何合格标识）、提供格鲁吉亚语说明书及安全信息，并配合市场监管机构。货物常经黑海港口波季（Poti）和巴统（Batumi）入境。具体合格评定路径、任何标识义务及标签／语言要求，应对照现行格鲁吉亚技术法规及GEOSTM指引确认，因该框架正处于欧盟趋同的积极过渡中。
summary.zht: 在喬治亞市場投放家用製冷器具須有一個設立於境內的經濟運營商——通常為對該產品在喬治亞市場負責的境內進口商或經銷商。在歐盟—喬治亞DCFTA框架下，喬治亞正向歐盟新方法合格評定及市場監管模式趨同，由GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準與計量局）管理，並實施國家合格評定與上市後監管。境內進口商一般負責確保產品附有所需的合格文件（技術文件、合格聲明及任何合格標識）、提供喬治亞語說明書及安全資訊，並配合市場監管機構。貨物常經黑海港口波季（Poti）和巴統（Batumi）入境。具體合格評定路徑、任何標識義務及標籤／語言要求，應對照現行喬治亞技術法規及GEOSTM指引確認，因該框架正處於歐盟趨同的積極過渡中。

standards_or_laws: EU-Georgia Association Agreement / DCFTA — New Approach conformity and market-surveillance approximation framework
GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology) — national conformity assessment and market surveillance
Georgian technical regulations on product safety and market surveillance (in transition toward the EU model)
In-country importer / responsible economic operator requirement for products placed on the Georgian market

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus the China Energy Label (GB 12021.2), all administered domestically by SAMR/CNCA and NDRC. The CCC certificate holder is the responsible party for domestic-market compliance. China has no statutory requirement obliging a Chinese export manufacturer to appoint a responsible economic operator established in the destination country; overseas importers or distributors are engaged on a commercial basis. This domestic responsibility structure does not extend to or satisfy Georgia's in-country importer / market-surveillance requirement.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并取得中国能效标识（GB 12021.2），均由SAMR／CNCA及NDRC在境内管理。CCC证书持有人为国内市场合规的责任方。中国无法定要求强制中国出口制造商在目的国指定设立于当地的责任经济运营商；海外进口商或经销商以商业形式接洽。该国内责任结构不延伸至、亦不满足格鲁吉亚的境内进口商／市场监管要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並取得中國能效標識（GB 12021.2），均由SAMR／CNCA及NDRC在境內管理。CCC證書持有人為國內市場合規的責任方。中國無法定要求強制中國出口製造商在目的國指定設立於當地的責任經濟運營商；海外進口商或經銷商以商業形式接洽。該國內責任結構不延伸至、亦不滿足喬治亞的境內進口商／市場監管要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015
N/A — no Chinese statutory obligation to appoint a destination-country responsible economic operator

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a Georgian market-access package that CCC and the China Energy Label do not cover: (1) appoint or contract an in-country importer / responsible economic operator established in Georgia; (2) assemble conformity documentation — technical file, conformity declaration, and test evidence acceptable to GEOSTM-recognised routes (IEC 60335-2-24 safety and CISPR 14 EMC, with EU-aligned energy data) — since Chinese CCC reports are not automatically accepted; (3) provide Georgian-language instructions and safety information and any required conformity marking; (4) plan importation logistics through Poti/Batumi with the importer handling customs and post-market obligations. The precise conformity route, any marking obligation, and the labelling/language rules are in active EU-approximation transition and must be confirmed against current Georgian technical regulations and GEOSTM guidance before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立一套CCC及中国能效标识未涵盖的格鲁吉亚市场准入文件包：（1）委任或签约设立于格鲁吉亚的境内进口商／责任经济运营商；（2）整理合格文件——技术文件、合格声明及GEOSTM认可路径可接受的检测证据（IEC 60335-2-24安全及CISPR 14电磁兼容，配合欧盟对齐的能效数据）——因中国CCC报告不被自动接受；（3）提供格鲁吉亚语说明书及安全信息，以及任何所需的合格标识；（4）规划经波季／巴统的进口物流，由进口商处理海关及上市后义务。具体合格评定路径、任何标识义务及标签／语言规则正处于欧盟趋同的积极过渡中，须在发货前对照现行格鲁吉亚技术法规及GEOSTM指引确认。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立一套CCC及中國能效標識未涵蓋的喬治亞市場准入文件包：（1）委任或簽約設立於喬治亞的境內進口商／責任經濟運營商；（2）整理合格文件——技術文件、合格聲明及GEOSTM認可路徑可接受的檢測證據（IEC 60335-2-24安全及CISPR 14電磁相容，配合歐盟對齊的能效數據）——因中國CCC報告不被自動接受；（3）提供喬治亞語說明書及安全資訊，以及任何所需的合格標識；（4）規劃經波季／巴統的進口物流，由進口商處理海關及上市後義務。具體合格評定路徑、任何標識義務及標籤／語言規則正處於歐盟趨同的積極過渡中，須在發貨前對照現行喬治亞技術法規及GEOSTM指引確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an in-country importer / responsible economic operator and GEOSTM-recognised conformity documentation are required for market placement in Georgia; the exact route and marking/labelling obligations are in EU-approximation transition and must be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China; no destination-country economic-operator obligation under Chinese law

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access in Georgia requires an in-country importer / responsible economic operator plus GEOSTM-recognised conformity documentation (IEC 60335-2-24 safety, CISPR 14 EMC, EU-aligned energy data); Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute. Goods commonly enter via Poti/Batumi. The conformity route, any marking obligation, and labelling/language rules are in EU-approximation transition — confirm against current Georgian technical regulations and GEOSTM guidance before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚市场准入须有境内进口商／责任经济运营商，并备齐GEOSTM认可的合格文件（IEC 60335-2-24安全、CISPR 14电磁兼容、欧盟对齐能效数据）；中国CCC及中国能效标识不可替代。货物常经波季／巴统入境。合格评定路径、任何标识义务及标签／语言规则正处于欧盟趋同过渡中——发货前请对照现行格鲁吉亚技术法规及GEOSTM指引确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞市場准入須有境內進口商／責任經濟運營商，並備齊GEOSTM認可的合格文件（IEC 60335-2-24安全、CISPR 14電磁相容、歐盟對齊能效數據）；中國CCC及中國能效標識不可替代。貨物常經波季／巴統入境。合格評定路徑、任何標識義務及標籤／語言規則正處於歐盟趨同過渡中——發貨前請對照現行喬治亞技術法規及GEOSTM指引確認。

requirement_topic.zh: 无线电型号核准——含无线功能的电冰箱（GNCC）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電型號核准——含無線功能的電冰箱（GNCC）

summary.en: Where a household refrigerator includes radio/wireless functionality — for example Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home connectivity — the radio module is subject to oversight by the GNCC (Georgian National Communications Commission), the national authority for electronic communications and radio spectrum. Radio-equipped products must use frequency bands and emission parameters permitted in Georgia and may require type approval or recognition of the radio equipment before market placement, in addition to the general electrical safety (IEC 60335-2-24) and EMC (CISPR 14) requirements administered through GEOSTM. Under EU approximation, Georgia is aligning toward the EU Radio Equipment model. Non-connected refrigerators (no intentional radio transmitter) fall outside GNCC radio type-approval scope and need only the safety, EMC, energy, and market-access requirements covered in the other rows. The exact GNCC procedure, permitted bands, and documentation should be confirmed against current GNCC rules.
summary.zh: 当家用电冰箱含有无线电／无线功能时——例如用于智能家居连接的Wi-Fi或蓝牙——其无线模块须受GNCC（格鲁吉亚国家通信委员会）监管，该机构为电子通信及无线电频谱的国家主管机构。含无线电产品须使用格鲁吉亚允许的频段及发射参数，并在投放市场前可能须取得无线电设备的型号核准或认可，此外还须满足由GEOSTM管理的一般电气安全（IEC 60335-2-24）及电磁兼容（CISPR 14）要求。在欧盟趋同下，格鲁吉亚正向欧盟无线电设备模式对齐。不含无线连接的电冰箱（无有意发射的无线电发射机）不属于GNCC无线电型号核准范围，仅须满足其他行所涵盖的安全、电磁兼容、能效及市场准入要求。具体GNCC程序、允许频段及文件要求，应对照现行GNCC规则确认。
summary.zht: 當家用電冰箱含有無線電／無線功能時——例如用於智慧家居連接的Wi-Fi或藍牙——其無線模組須受GNCC（喬治亞國家通信委員會）監管，該機構為電子通信及無線電頻譜的國家主管機構。含無線電產品須使用喬治亞允許的頻段及發射參數，並在投放市場前可能須取得無線電設備的型號核准或認可，此外還須滿足由GEOSTM管理的一般電氣安全（IEC 60335-2-24）及電磁相容（CISPR 14）要求。在歐盟趨同下，喬治亞正向歐盟無線電設備模式對齊。不含無線連接的電冰箱（無有意發射的無線電發射機）不屬於GNCC無線電型號核准範圍，僅須滿足其他行所涵蓋的安全、電磁相容、能效及市場准入要求。具體GNCC程序、允許頻段及文件要求，應對照現行GNCC規則確認。

standards_or_laws: GNCC (Georgian National Communications Commission) — radio spectrum and radio-equipment type-approval authority
Georgian radio-equipment / spectrum rules (permitted bands and emission parameters for Wi-Fi / Bluetooth)
EU-Georgia DCFTA — approximation toward the EU Radio Equipment regulatory model
IEC / EU-aligned radio test standards for short-range devices (where applicable to the wireless module)

summary.en: In China, wireless modules in appliances are regulated through the SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) Type Approval administered by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT). A refrigerator with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth would carry an SRRC approval for the radio module, alongside CCC for safety and EMC. The SRRC type approval is specific to China's permitted frequency bands and power limits; it is not recognised in Georgia and does not satisfy GNCC requirements. Non-connected refrigerators have no radio approval requirement in either market.
summary.zh: 在中国，器具中的无线模块通过由工业和信息化部（MIIT）管理的SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准进行监管。含Wi-Fi或蓝牙的电冰箱须为其无线模块取得SRRC核准，并同时取得涵盖安全与电磁兼容的CCC。SRRC型号核准针对中国允许的频段及功率限值；其在格鲁吉亚不被承认，亦不满足GNCC要求。不含无线连接的电冰箱在两个市场均无无线电核准要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，器具中的無線模組通過由工業和信息化部（MIIT）管理的SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准進行監管。含Wi-Fi或藍牙的電冰箱須為其無線模組取得SRRC核准，並同時取得涵蓋安全與電磁相容的CCC。SRRC型號核准針對中國允許的頻段及功率限值；其在喬治亞不被承認，亦不滿足GNCC要求。不含無線連接的電冰箱在兩個市場均無無線電核准要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) Type Approval — administered by MIIT for radio modules (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety + EMC (applies to the appliance regardless of wireless features)
N/A — SRRC approval is China-specific and not recognised by GNCC

gap.en: This gap applies only to wireless-enabled refrigerators: (1) Chinese SRRC type approval is not recognised in Georgia; a wireless-enabled refrigerator may require GNCC type approval or recognition of the radio module against Georgia's permitted bands and emission parameters before market placement; (2) the wireless module must operate within Georgian frequency allocations, which follow EU/CEPT-aligned short-range-device bands rather than China's SRRC allocations — verify band and power compatibility; (3) radio documentation and any required radio test reports (EU-aligned standards) must be assembled for the GNCC route, separate from the GEOSTM safety/EMC conformity. Manufacturers should confirm the current GNCC procedure and whether EU-style radio test evidence is accepted. Non-connected models avoid this gap entirely and need only the safety, EMC, energy, and importer/market-access requirements.
gap.zh: 此差距仅适用于含无线功能的电冰箱：（1）中国SRRC型号核准在格鲁吉亚不被承认；含无线功能的电冰箱在投放市场前可能须取得GNCC型号核准，或须就无线模块对照格鲁吉亚允许的频段及发射参数取得认可；（2）无线模块须在格鲁吉亚频率分配范围内运行，该分配遵循欧盟／CEPT对齐的短距离设备频段，而非中国SRRC分配——须核实频段及功率兼容性；（3）须为GNCC路径整理无线电文件及任何所需的无线电检测报告（欧盟对齐标准），与GEOSTM安全／电磁兼容合格评定分开。制造商应确认现行GNCC程序，以及欧盟式无线电检测证据是否被接受。不含无线连接的型号完全避开此差距，仅须满足安全、电磁兼容、能效及进口商／市场准入要求。
gap.zht: 此差距僅適用於含無線功能的電冰箱：（1）中國SRRC型號核准在喬治亞不被承認；含無線功能的電冰箱在投放市場前可能須取得GNCC型號核准，或須就無線模組對照喬治亞允許的頻段及發射參數取得認可；（2）無線模組須在喬治亞頻率分配範圍內運行，該分配遵循歐盟／CEPT對齊的短距離設備頻段，而非中國SRRC分配——須核實頻段及功率相容性；（3）須為GNCC路徑整理無線電文件及任何所需的無線電檢測報告（歐盟對齊標準），與GEOSTM安全／電磁相容合格評定分開。製造商應確認現行GNCC程序，以及歐盟式無線電檢測證據是否被接受。不含無線連接的型號完全避開此差距，僅須滿足安全、電磁相容、能效及進口商／市場准入要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless-enabled models — GNCC radio type approval / recognition may be required before market placement; not applicable to non-connected refrigerators with no intentional radio transmitter
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless-enabled models — SRRC type approval required for the radio module before sale in China (administered by MIIT); not applicable to non-connected refrigerators

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Only wireless-enabled refrigerators (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth) trigger this requirement: the radio module is overseen by GNCC and may need Georgian type approval or recognition against permitted EU/CEPT-aligned bands. Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised in Georgia. Non-connected refrigerators are out of scope. Confirm the current GNCC procedure and whether EU-style radio test evidence is accepted before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅含无线功能的电冰箱（Wi-Fi／蓝牙）触发此要求：无线模块由GNCC监管，可能须就允许的欧盟／CEPT对齐频段取得格鲁吉亚型号核准或认可。中国SRRC核准在格鲁吉亚不被承认。不含无线连接的电冰箱不在范围内。投放市场前请确认现行GNCC程序及欧盟式无线电检测证据是否被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅含無線功能的電冰箱（Wi-Fi／藍牙）觸發此要求：無線模組由GNCC監管，可能須就允許的歐盟／CEPT對齊頻段取得喬治亞型號核准或認可。中國SRRC核准在喬治亞不被承認。不含無線連接的電冰箱不在範圍內。投放市場前請確認現行GNCC程序及歐盟式無線電檢測證據是否被接受。
